question: If Principal = Rs. 20000, Time = 2 Years, and Rate of Interest = 10% p.a., find the Simple Interest (S.I), Compound Interest (C.I), and the difference between them.
options: S.I: Rs. 4000, C.I: Rs. 4000, Diff: Rs. 0
S.I: Rs. 4000, C.I: Rs. 4200, Diff: Rs. 200
S.I: Rs. 4200, C.I: Rs. 4400, Diff: Rs. 200
S.I: Rs. 4000, C.I: Rs. 4100, Diff: Rs. 100
answer: S.I: Rs. 4000, C.I: Rs. 4200, Diff: Rs. 200
